ddls:
CREATE TABLE "swimmers" (
  "swimmer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each swimmer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the swimmer */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the swimmer (f for female, m for male) */,
  "age_at_first_event" INTEGER /* Age of the swimmer at the time of their first recorded event */,
  "first_event_date" TEXT /* Date of the swimmer's first recorded event */,
  "last_event_date" TEXT /* Date of the swimmer's last recorded event */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the swimmer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the swimmer */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the swimmer's profile image */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the swimmer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the swimmer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the swimmer's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the swimmer's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("swimmer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the swim (e.g., SN, NS) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., long-distance, short-distance) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  "water_temperature" REAL /* Water temperature during the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Unique name for the event */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the event organizer */,
  "event_url" TEXT /* URL to the event's official page or registration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "swimmer_events" (
  "swimmer_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each swimmer-event combination */,
  "swimmer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the swimmer */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "swim_time" TEXT /* Time achieved by the swimmer in the event */,
  "age_at_event" INTEGER /* Age of the swimmer at the time of the event */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the swimmer in the event */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the swim in the event */,
  "pace" TEXT /* Pace (time per unit distance) of the swimmer in the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the swimmer-event record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the swimmer-event record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("swimmer_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_swimmer_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_swimmer_events_swimmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("swimmer_id") REFERENCES swimmers ("swimmer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
